component.name: CDG Player
component.summary: CD+G and CD+EG karaoke disc player

description.p: A karaoke disc player supporting CD+G and CD+EG formats. Plays disc images from .cue/.bin files as well as ZIP and 7z archives. Supports MKV export with AV1 video and FLAC audio. CD+EG support based on hcs64's decoder (used with permission).
